'''âng-h-r''' ('''kangahar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whiffle|whiffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whiffle|whiffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kangahar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingahar|thingahar]] || [[word:jingahar|jingahar]] || [[word:shingahar|shingahar]] || [[word:kingahar|kingahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungahar|thuthungahar]] || [[word:jujungahar|jujungahar]] || [[word:shushungahar|shushungahar]] || [[word:kukungahar|kukungahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungahar|thungahar]] || [[word:jungahar|jungahar]] || [[word:shungahar|shungahar]] || [[word:kungahar|kungahar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungahar|thungahar]] || [[word:jungahar|jungahar]] || [[word:shungahar|shungahar]] || [[word:kungahar|kungahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengahar|thengahar]] || [[word:jengahar|jengahar]] || [[word:shengahar|shengahar]] || [[word:kengahar|kengahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongahar|thothongahar]] || [[word:jojongahar|jojongahar]] || [[word:shoshongahar|shoshongahar]] || [[word:kokongahar|kokongahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongahar|thongahar]] || [[word:jongahar|jongahar]] || [[word:shongahar|shongahar]] || [[word:kongahar|kongahar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongahar|thongahar]] || [[word:jongahar|jongahar]] || [[word:shongahar|shongahar]] || [[word:kongahar|kongahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngahar|thĂŠngahar]] || [[word:jĂŠngahar|jĂŠngahar]] || [[word:shĂŠngahar|shĂŠngahar]] || [[word:kĂŠngahar|kĂŠngahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangahar|thathangahar]] || [[word:jajangahar|jajangahar]] || [[word:shashangahar|shashangahar]] || [[word:kakangahar|kakangahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangahar|thangahar]] || [[word:jangahar|jangahar]] || [[word:shangahar|shangahar]] || [[word:kangahar|kangahar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangahar|thangahar]] || [[word:jangahar|jangahar]] || [[word:shangahar|shangahar]] || [[word:kangahar|kangahar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangahar|shangahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangahar|goshangahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangahar|gokishangahar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangaharnĂŒ|shangaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangaharnknĂŒ|goshangaharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangaharnĂŒ|gokishangaharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangaharshĂ«|shangaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangaharnkshĂ«|goshangaharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangaharshĂ«|gokishangaharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangaharo|shangaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangaharnkro|goshangaharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangaharo|gokishangaharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangaharmu|shangaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangaharnkmu|goshangaharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangaharmu|gokishangaharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangaharsher|shangaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangaharnksher|goshangaharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangaharsher|gokishangaharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangaharng|shangaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangaharnkng|goshangaharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangaharng|gokishangaharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangaharya|shangaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangaharnkya|goshangaharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangaharya|gokishangaharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangaharyam|shangaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangaharnkyam|goshangaharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangaharyam|gokishangaharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangaharnĂŒshĂ«|shangaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangaharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangaharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangaharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangaharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangaharnĂŒro|shangaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangaharnknĂŒro|goshangaharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangaharnĂŒro|gokishangaharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangaharnĂŒmu|shangaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangaharnknĂŒmu|goshangaharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangaharnĂŒmu|gokishangaharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangaharshĂ«nĂŒ|shangaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangaharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangaharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangaharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangaharshĂ«ro|shangaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangaharnkshĂ«ro|goshangaharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangaharshĂ«ro|gokishangaharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangaharshĂ«mu|shangaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangaharnkshĂ«mu|goshangaharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangaharshĂ«mu|gokishangaharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangaharonĂŒ|shangaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangaharnkronĂŒ|goshangaharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangaharonĂŒ|gokishangaharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangaharoshĂ«|shangaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangaharnkroshĂ«|goshangaharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangaharoshĂ«|gokishangaharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangaharomu|shangaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangaharnkromu|goshangaharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangaharomu|gokishangaharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangaharmunĂŒ|shangaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangaharnkmunĂŒ|goshangaharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangaharmunĂŒ|gokishangaharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangaharmushĂ«|shangaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangaharnkmushĂ«|goshangaharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangaharmushĂ«|gokishangaharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangaharmuro|shangaharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangaharnkmuro|goshangaharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangaharmuro|gokishangaharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
